sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Pizzi, AerSale CIO, sells $13.5k in shares
feed.summary: Enrique Pizzi, AerSale's CIO, sold 1,825 shares for $13,466, a transaction made to cover tax obligations from vested restricted stock units. Despite this insider sale, management has been actively buying back shares, and the company maintains strong financial health. AerSale recently reported Q3 2025 results below expectations and experienced a warehouse fire at its Roswell facility, the impact of which is currently being evaluated.

feed.title: The Walt Disney Company – Streaming turns profitable
feed.summary: Phillip Securities Research has initiated coverage of The Walt Disney Company with an "ACCUMULATE" rating and a target price of US$130.00. The report highlights Disney's diversified portfolio, strong intellectual property, and the successful profitability of its direct-to-consumer (DTC) streaming segment in 2H24. The Experiences segment is identified as the primary growth driver, showing consistent revenue growth and supported by resilient attendance.

feed.title: KHNP says will expand nuclear capacity factor to 15-yr high to meet growing demand
feed.summary: Korea Hydro & Nuclear Power Co. (KHNP) plans to increase the capacity factor of its nuclear power plants to 89% in 2026, the highest in 15 years, to lower electricity rates and meet growing demand from AI and semiconductor sectors. This includes resuming operation of the Kori-2 reactor after a 10-year life extension approval and pursuing extensions for other reactors. The company views nuclear power as a crucial supplement to intermittent renewable energy sources.

feed.title: Bank of America stock falls on Trump credit-card rate cap talk as CPI, earnings near
feed.summary: Bank of America (BAC) stock fell following reports of President Donald Trump's proposal to cap credit card interest rates at 10%. This news comes as major banks prepare for Q4 2025 earnings reports, with investors closely watching consumer credit outlook and the potential impact of rate caps on revenue streams. The broader financial sector also saw declines, while uncertainty about Federal Reserve rate cuts and upcoming CPI data further influenced market sentiment.

feed.title: Cohen & Steers (CNS) Reports Decrease in Assets Under Management
feed.summary: Cohen & Steers (CNS) reported a $1.4 billion decrease in assets under management (AUM) in December 2025, primarily due to market depreciation, totaling $90.5 billion. Despite this, the firm maintains strong financial health with robust operating margins and a high Altman Z-Score. Valuation metrics suggest potential undervaluation, with the stock trading near historical lows.

feed.title: Domo, Amplitude, and LiveRamp Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of Domo, Amplitude, and LiveRamp, among other enterprise software companies, experienced a downturn in an afternoon session due to competitive anxiety in the sector. This sell-off was triggered by a high-profile downgrade of Adobe, concerns about Snowflake facing pressure from Amazon and Oracle, and DocuSign and Asana struggling with market commoditization. Despite the market overreaction, these price drops could present buying opportunities for high-quality stocks in the long run.

feed.title: Arista Networks Inc. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
feed.summary: Arista Networks Inc. (ANET) stock experienced a strong trading day, outperforming its competitors. The stock closed at $289.47, marking a 1.25% increase and surpassing the S&P 500's daily gain of 1.22%. This positive performance comes despite a mixed trading session for other tech giants.

feed.title: Analog Devices (NASDAQ:ADI) SVP Sells $150,730.00 in Stock
feed.summary: Analog Devices (NASDAQ:ADI) SVP Katsufumi Nakamura sold 500 shares of the company's stock for $150,730.00 on January 9th and another 500 shares for $144,585.00 on January 7th. Following these sales, Nakamura directly owns 12,710 shares valued at approximately $3.83 million. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates for both EPS and revenue, and maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating among analysts.

feed.title: Samsung and Corning team up to tackle OLED displays
feed.summary: Corning Incorporated and Samsung Mobile Display Company have formed an equity joint venture in Korea to produce glass substrates for Organic Light Emitting Diode (OLED) displays. This collaboration will leverage Corning's Lotus Glass substrate technology and Samsung Mobile Display's OLED display expertise to create displays for various devices, from tablets to televisions. The Lotus Glass substrate, designed for low-temperature poly-silicon and oxide thin-film transistor backplane manufacturing, is suitable for both LCD and OLED displays.

feed.title: Align Technology Sponsors 30 Invisalign® Treatments Through Smiles4Canada Program to Provide Orthodontic Care to Children and Teens
feed.summary: Align Technology is sponsoring 30 Invisalign treatments through the Canadian Foundation for the Advancement of Orthodontics' (CFAO) Smiles4Canada program. This initiative will provide orthodontic care to children and teens from families who lack the financial resources for such treatments. The sponsorship underscores Align Technology's commitment to increasing access to orthodontic care and supporting the Canadian orthodontic profession.

feed.title: ITW Schedules Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Earnings Webcast
feed.summary: Illinois Tool Works Inc. (ITW) announced it will release its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results on Tuesday, February 3, 2026, at 7:00 a.m. CST, followed by an earnings webcast at 9:00 a.m. CST. The company provided details for accessing the webcast and conference call, along with replay information. ITW, a Fortune 300 global multi-industrial manufacturing leader, reported revenue of $15.9 billion in 2024.

feed.title: JPM26: Biotech’s M&A lift, the ‘new’ Biogen and Merck’s $70B target
feed.summary: The 2026 J.P. Morgan Healthcare conference highlights a renewed vigor in biotech venture investments, driven by a surge in M&A deals and hope for IPOs. Major players like Biogen, Merck, Moderna, and Summit Therapeutics are navigating crucial drug pipelines and market shifts. Merck aims for $70 billion in sales by the mid-2030s, while Moderna anticipates a pivotal year with potential vaccine approvals and significant revenue growth.

feed.title: 'Most Severe AI Vulnerability to Date' Hits ServiceNow
feed.summary: A critical AI-driven vulnerability in ServiceNow, dubbed the "most severe AI-driven vulnerability uncovered to date," exposed customers' data and connected systems. The flaw allowed attackers to gain full control over the platform and access integrated systems by exploiting authentication issues in ServiceNow's Virtual Agent and its new "Now Assist" agentic AI technology. While ServiceNow has patched the vulnerability, experts advise organizations to implement strict review processes for AI agents to prevent similar future risks.

feed.title: Deep Dive Into Freeport-McMoRan Stock: Analyst Perspectives (11 Ratings)
feed.summary: Eleven analysts have recently provided their perspectives on Freeport-McMoRan (NYSE: FCX), with an average 12-month price target of $55.55, an 11.1% increase from the previous average. Several analysts have raised their price targets and ratings, reflecting evolving sentiments. The company, a major copper and gold miner, shows strong market capitalization and positive revenue growth, though its net margin and return on assets lag behind industry averages.

feed.title: Ulta Beauty’s Kecia Steelman on AI, Cultural Relevance, International and More
feed.summary: Kecia Steelman, CEO of Ulta Beauty, discussed the retailer's "Ulta Beauty Unleashed" growth strategy at NRF's B ig Show 2026, focusing on driving the core U.S. business, developing new margin-creating ventures, and realigning foundational growth. Steelman emphasized a data-driven, omnichannel approach using AI for personalization, and highlighted the expansion into wellness, exclusive offerings, and international markets like Mexico and the Middle East, while stressing the importance of not neglecting the core business.

feed.title: SCOTUS asks White House to opine on shipbuilders’ no-poach dispute
feed.summary: The U.S. Supreme Court has requested the Solicitor General's input on a no-poach dispute involving shipbuilders, signaling potential intervention. The case revolves around allegations that several companies maintained an "unwritten rule" not to hire each other's naval engineers, conspiring to suppress wages, and whether fraudulent concealment extends the statute of limitations. This dispute highlights increasing legal scrutiny on no-poach agreements, following previous guidance from the DOJ and FTC.

feed.title: Teradyne to Announce Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
feed.summary: Teradyne, Inc. (NASDAQ: TER) will release its fourth quarter and full year 2025 financial results on Monday, February 2, 2026, after 5:00 p.m. ET. A conference call and webcast to discuss these results and management's business outlook will be held on Tuesday, February 3, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET. Investors can access the webcast and presentation materials via the company’s investor relations website.

feed.title: Microchip Technologies Stock Poised for Further Upside?
feed.summary: Microchip Technologies (MCHP) stock has gained over 32% in the past year, driven by strong demand in AI and memory sectors, and was recently highlighted by Mizuho as a key semiconductor outperformer for 2026. The company recently reported solid Q2 earnings, exceeding forecasts with stabilizing sales and healthy margins. While analysts generally rate MCHP as a "Moderate Buy," its current valuation is considered high, suggesting less immediate upside despite promising long-term prospects.

feed.title: PulteGroup Inc. Is Quietly Crushing It: Is This ‘Boring’ Stock Your Next Power Move?
feed.summary: PulteGroup Inc. is presented as a "boring" but potentially powerful investment in the housing market, contrasting its steady performance and real profits with speculative meme stocks. The article highlights its strong price action, diversified business model in homebuilding, and favorable macro-economic conditions like existing housing shortages and demographic demand. It advises investors to consider PulteGroup for long-term wealth building, despite its cyclical nature and sensitivity to interest rates.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC has issued $693,000 in Uncapped Buffered Return Enhanced Notes linked to the S&P 500® Futures Excess Return Index, fully and unconditionally guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. These notes, priced on January 9, 2026, are designed for investors seeking an uncapped return of 1.51 times the appreciation of the S&P 500® Futures Excess Return Index at maturity, while being willing to risk up to 80% of their principal. The offering details and significant risk considerations, including credit risks, conflicts of interest, and market factors affecting the notes' value, are outlined in the pricing supplement.

feed.title: Citigroup Umumkan Dividen Kuartalan Sebesar $0,60 per Saham
feed.summary: Citigroup Inc. mengumumkan dividen kuartalan sebesar $0,60 per saham biasa, dibayarkan pada 27 Februari 2026, kepada pemegang saham yang tercatat per 2 Februari 2026. Ini menghasilkan dividen tahunan sebesar $2,40 per saham dengan imbal hasil 1,98%. Perusahaan juga mengumumkan dividen untuk beberapa seri saham preferennya, dengan pembayaran dijadwalkan pada pertengahan Februari 2026.

feed.title: MANNATECH INC SEC 10-Q Report
feed.summary: Mannatech Inc. released its Q1 2025 Form 10-Q report, detailing a decline in key financial metrics and operational challenges, particularly in Asia. Net sales decreased by 9.6% to $26.6 million, and the company reported a net loss of $1.5 million. The report indicates decreased active associates and product sales, prompting plans for revenue growth, margin improvement, and cost control.

feed.title: Procter & Gamble Declares Quarterly Dividend, Extending Streak
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble (PG) has declared a quarterly dividend of $1.0568 per share, continuing its 135-year dividend history and 69 years of dividend increases. This announcement reinforces P&G's reputation as a reliable income stock for investors. While a recent analyst rating suggests a "Buy" with a $158.00 price target, TipRanks' AI Analyst Spark views PG as "Neutral," citing strong financial performance offset by bearish technical indicators and valuation concerns.

feed.title: CPPA Enforces against Two Data Brokers for Failing to Register Under the Delete Act
authors: Hunton Andrews Kurth’s Privacy and Cybersecurity
Hunton Andrews Kurth - Privacy and Information Security Law Blog-Hunton Andrews Kurth
feed.summary: The California Privacy Protection Agency (CPPA) has taken enforcement action against Datamasters and S&P Global for not registering as data brokers under California's Delete Act. Datamasters was fined $45,000 and ordered to cease selling personal information of California residents, particularly after it was found to be selling sensitive data for targeted advertising. S&P Global, after initially failing to register due to an administrative error, promptly registered and agreed to compliance procedures, resulting in a $62,600 fine.

feed.title: Google stock (GOOG) rises after-hours on Apple’s Gemini-Siri deal as earnings near
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc. (GOOG) Class C shares rose 1.1% in after-hours trading following news of Apple's plan to integrate Google's Gemini AI models into Siri and other AI features. This partnership is seen as a significant win for Alphabet in the generative AI space, especially as the company approaches its Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings release on February 4th. Investors are closely watching how AI advancements will impact revenue and costs, and whether this high-profile deal will boost Gemini usage and Google Cloud demand.

feed.title: Praxis Precision Medicines Appoints Dr. Orrin Devinsky as Head of Clinical Strategy
feed.summary: Praxis Precision Medicines has appointed Dr. Orrin Devinsky, a renowned neurologist and epilepsy expert, as its Head of Clinical Strategy, a newly created leadership role. Dr. Devinsky, with over four decades of experience and numerous contributions to clinical neuroscience, will guide the company's clinical strategy and global medical affairs, particularly as it advances its late-stage product portfolio. His appointment is expected to bolster Praxis's efforts in developing transformative therapies for neurological disorders, especially epilepsy.

feed.title: ResMed Chairman Emeritus Peter Farrell Sells 2,000 Shares Under Trading Plan
feed.summary: ResMed Chairman Emeritus Peter C. Farrell sold 2,000 shares of ResMed common stock on January 7, 2026, for $248.83 per share under a pre-arranged trading plan. Despite the sale, he retains a significant stake of 66,773 shares in the company. ResMed (AU:RMD) is a medical technology company specializing in sleep-disordered breathing and chronic respiratory conditions.

feed.title: ResMed CEO Michael Farrell Exercises Options and Sells Shares Under 10b5-1 Plan
feed.summary: ResMed CEO Michael Farrell recently exercised stock options to acquire 4,991 shares at $146.34 per share and subsequently sold them for approximately $248.46 per share under a pre-arranged 10b5-1 trading plan. Despite the sale, Farrell retains a significant stake in the company, holding 466,223 direct shares and additional indirect holdings. ResMed is a medical technology company specializing in devices and software for sleep apnea and respiratory conditions, with its stock currently rated as a Buy by analysts.

feed.title: EOG Resources Schedules Conference Call and Webcast of Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results for February 25, 2026
feed.summary: EOG Resources, Inc. (NYSE: EOG) announced it will host a conference call and webcast to discuss its fourth quarter and full year 2025 financial results. The event is scheduled for Wednesday, February 25, 2026, at 9 a.m. Central time. Interested parties can access a live webcast on the company's website, with a replay available for one year.

feed.title: Pinnacle CEO Kevin Blair and Executive Leaders Ring Opening Bell at New York Stock Exchange
feed.summary: Pinnacle Financial Partners President and CEO Kevin Blair, along with his executive team, rang the New York Stock Exchange opening bell to celebrate the closing of the firm's merger with Synovus Financial Corp. and its new NYSE listing. The combined $117.2 billion asset regional bank will continue to operate Pinnacle and Synovus brands independently until early 2027, aiming to be America's most trusted bank. This event highlights Pinnacle's growth and its strong position as the largest bank headquartered in Tennessee and Georgia, with a significant presence across the Southeast and Atlantic Coast.

feed.title: Procter & Gamble Co Declares Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble Co (PG) announced a quarterly dividend of $1.0568 per share on January 13, 2026. This dividend is payable on February 17, 2026, to shareholders of record as of January 23, 2026. The company boasts a long history of dividend payments, having paid dividends for 135 consecutive years and increasing them for 69 consecutive years.

feed.title: Broadcom issues $4.5 billion in senior notes, plans debt redemption
feed.summary: Broadcom Inc. has announced the issuance of $4.5 billion in senior notes across four series, with interest rates ranging from 4.300% to 5.700% and maturities between 2031 and 2056. The company plans to use these proceeds for general corporate purposes and to redeem several existing senior notes, including those issued by its subsidiary VMware LLC. This move comes as Broadcom reports a 24% year-over-year revenue increase for fiscal year 2025, driven by a 65% expansion in AI semiconductor revenue.

feed.title: LPL, Ameriprise report online attacks on clients’ accounts, data to Maine.
feed.summary: LPL Financial and Ameriprise Financial Services have reported separate incidents of online attacks affecting client accounts and data. LPL experienced a "pump-and-dump" trading scheme impacting 53 clients, while an Ameriprise financial advisor fell victim to a phishing scam, potentially exposing data for 598 clients. Both firms have notified Maine's Attorney General and are investigating the incidents.

feed.title: Broadcom Announces $4.5 Billion Senior Notes Offering
feed.summary: Broadcom has announced a $4.5 billion senior notes offering to be used for general corporate purposes and debt repayment. In conjunction with this, Broadcom and its VMware subsidiary will redeem approximately $4 billion of existing notes in early 2026, aiming to retire nearer-term issues and extend the overall debt maturity profile. Analysts currently rate AVGO as a Buy, with TipRanks' AI Analyst giving it an Outperform based on strong financial performance and positive sentiment from growth in AI semiconductors and software.

feed.title: Murphy USA to share Q4 2025 performance in Feb. webcast and live Q&A
feed.summary: Murphy USA Inc. (NYSE: MUSA) announced it will release its fourth quarter 2025 financial results after market close on Wednesday, February 4, 2026. This will be followed by a webcasted question and answer session on Thursday, February 5, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. CT, which will include pre-recorded management remarks. Investors can access the remarks and the live Q&A through the company's Investor Relations website.

feed.title: Praxis Precision Medicines Appoints Global Epilepsy Leader Dr. Orrin Devinsky as Head of Clinical Strategy
feed.summary: Praxis Precision Medicines has appointed Dr. Orrin Devinsky, a highly respected neurologist and epilepsy expert, as its Head of Clinical Strategy. Dr. Devinsky, known for his work in developing transformative therapies and establishing global research initiatives in epilepsy, will guide the company's clinical strategy and medical affairs as it advances its late-stage portfolio. This appointment underscores Praxis's commitment to precision neuroscience and its focus on bringing next-generation CNS medicines to patients.

feed.title: Clorox Announces February 3 Webcast of Second-Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Results
feed.summary: The Clorox Company announced a webcast for its second-quarter fiscal year 2026 results scheduled for February 3, 2026. A press release and prepared remarks will be posted at 1:15 p.m. PT / 4:15 p.m. ET, followed by a live Q&A audio webcast with Chair and CEO Linda Rendle and Chief Financial Officer Luc Bellet at 2 p.m. PT / 5 p.m. ET. Links to these resources will be available on the Clorox investor relations website.

feed.title: 10 High Risk Dividend Stocks To Avoid
feed.summary: This article identifies 10 high-risk dividend stocks to avoid, all of which have "F" Dividend Risk Scores and payout ratios exceeding 100%, indicating an inability to sustain their current dividend payouts. The list, sorted by payout ratio, provides a brief overview of each company's recent financial performance and the reasons for its high-risk classification. Income investors are advised to be cautious with these stocks to prevent potential dividend cuts or eliminations.

feed.title: Hormel Foods To Hold 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders
feed.summary: Hormel Foods Corporation will host its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders in person on January 27, 2026, at 6 p.m. CST in Austin, Minnesota. Stockholders must present photo identification and proof of ownership to attend, with an expedited check-in process available for those who pre-register by January 22, 2026. A question-and-answer session will follow the business portion, with questions required to be submitted in advance.

feed.title: Missile Defense awards $151B SHIELD deal for homeland protection
feed.summary: HII's Mission Technologies division has been awarded a Missile Defense Agency SHIELD indefinite-delivery/indefinite-quantity (IDIQ) contract with a ceiling of $151 billion. This contract opens opportunities for HII in directed energy, command-and-control integration, data and cyber operations, microelectronics, spectrum management, training, logistics, and sustainment. The award reinforces HII's commitment to national security and homeland defense, leveraging its expertise in defense technology.

feed.title: SPAM Museum gift boxes await Hormel stockholders after 2026 meeting
feed.summary: Hormel Foods will host its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders in person on January 27, 2026, at Austin High School in Austin, Minnesota. Stockholders of record as of November 28, 2025, are eligible to attend, with pre-registration available for expedited check-in. Additionally, eligible stockholders can pick up gift boxes at the SPAM Museum from January 28-31, 2026, while supplies last, requiring proof of ownership.

feed.title: KLA Corp. initiated with an Outperform at Bernstein
feed.summary: Bernstein analyst Stacy Rasgon initiated coverage of KLA Corp. (KLAC) with an Outperform rating and a $1,700 price target, expecting the company to achieve low double-digit revenue growth and mid double-digit earnings growth over the next several years. Despite an elevated valuation, KLA merits a premium due to its strong structural growth drivers, competitive standing with reduced China replacement risk, and appealing financial model. This initiation follows several other analysts recently raising their price targets for KLAC.

feed.title: Charles River Labs to acquire K.F. Cambodia and PathoQuest SAS By Investing.com
feed.summary: Charles River Laboratories International, Inc. announced its plans to acquire K.F. (Cambodia) Ltd. for approximately $510 million and exercise its option to purchase the remaining 79% stake in PathoQuest SAS for about $60 million. These acquisitions are set to strengthen Charles River’s non-human primate supply chain and enhance its biologics testing capabilities with next-generation sequencing solutions. The company also reported improving demand trends, with shares trading near a 52-week high, and a leadership transition plan for 2026.

feed.title: N2OFF Signs Multiple Material Agreements
feed.summary: N2OFF has announced two significant agreements with Voice Assist. The first involves N2OFF transferring approximately 98% of Save Foods to Voice Assist in exchange for a 19.99% equity stake in Voice Assist. The second is a Services Agreement where N2OFF will provide advisory services, receiving deferred cash, royalties, and a share of future proceeds, effectively streamlining its portfolio while participating in Voice Assist's growth.

feed.title: Destination XL holiday sales drop 5.8% amid retail challenges By Investing.com
feed.summary: Destination XL Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:DXLG) reported a 5.8% decrease in comparable sales for the nine-week holiday period ending January 3, 2026, totaling $89.9 million. This decline reflects a challenging retail environment, particularly in stores, despite strategic promotions in their direct business. The company is set to merge with FullBeauty in the first half of fiscal 2026, a transaction expected to create a $1.2 billion retailer with approximately $25 million in cost synergies.

feed.title: Movado group SVP Kennedy sells $26948 in shares By Investing.com
feed.summary: Michelle Kennedy, SVP of Human Resources at Movado Group Inc, sold 1,290 shares of common stock for $26,948 on December 9, 2025, and acquired 84 shares on January 2, 2026, through phantom stock unit conversion. This comes as Movado Group reported third-quarter adjusted EPS of $0.45, missing analyst expectations, though revenue slightly exceeded forecasts at $186.1 million. Northland has initiated coverage with an Outperform rating and a $30 price target, suggesting current tariff situations may offer a favorable entry point.

feed.title: ROLLINS, INC. SCHEDULES DATE FOR RELEASE OF FOURTH QUARTER AND FULL YEAR 2025 FINANCIAL RESULTS
feed.summary: Rollins, Inc. announced it will release its fourth quarter and full year 2025 financial results after market close on Wednesday, February 11, 2026. The company will host a conference call on Thursday, February 12, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss these results. Interested parties can access the call via phone or a live webcast on Rollins' investor relations website.

feed.title: Netflix Stock (NFLX) Jumps on Reports It Will Make All-Cash Offer for Warner Bros. Discovery
feed.summary: Netflix (NFLX) stock rose on reports that the company plans to make an all-cash offer for Warner Bros. Discovery (WBD). This revised proposal comes amidst a takeover battle between Netflix and Paramount Skydance (PSKY) for Warner Bros. Discovery, with Netflix aiming to acquire only the streaming business and key franchises.

feed.title: ConocoPhillips (COP) Price Target Lowered by $6
feed.summary: Piper Sandler analyst Ryan Todd reduced the price target for ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) from $115 to $109, while maintaining an ‘Overweight’ rating, still indicating an approximate 12% upside. Despite a bearish crude oil outlook for 2026, the oil refining market is expected to improve, driven by tighter supply/demand dynamics. The company stands to benefit from potential recoveries of up to $12 billion from Venezuela and boasts an annual dividend yield of 3.33%.

feed.title: 6M electric customers get peek as FirstEnergy details 2025 results
feed.summary: FirstEnergy (NYSE: FE) announced it will release its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 financial results after market close on Tuesday, February 17, 2026. Management will discuss these results during a conference call with financial analysts at 9:00 a.m. EST on Wednesday, February 18, 2026, with a live webcast and presentation slides available for investors. The company serves over 6 million customers across several states and operates approximately 24,000 miles of transmission lines.
